{"problem_standardized_math":"Consider the parameterized optimization problem\n\\[\n\\min_x \\left(x_1-\\frac{3}{2}\\right)^2+(x_2-t)^4\n\\quad \\text{subject to} \\quad\n\\begin{bmatrix}\n1-x_1-x_2\\\\\n1-x_1+x_2\\\\\n1+x_1-x_2\\\\\n1+x_1+x_2\n\\end{bmatrix} \\ge 0,\n\\]\nwhere \(t\) is fixed before solving the problem. For what values of \(t\) does the point \(x^*=(1,0)^T\) satisfy the KKT conditions?"}
